descriptors: Absent — no evidence of structured capability
Emerging — documented, repeatable in pilots, partial adoption

evidence: Budget authorized for MAS FEAT/HKMA Ethics remediation

dimensions.name: Authority Mapping
evidence: Escalation paths for fairness violations defined
remediation: Continuous monitoring of decision rights effectiveness

quickWins: Include ZK-DP proofs in model release notes

Standardize CAE across all APAC retail models

dimensions.name: Pilot Management
evidence: Pilot charters include regulatory gate checks
remediation: Scale-up pilots to full production workloads
